failedAssertions.reason: No conflict resolution dialog component exists in the renderer. The main process has conflict resolution logic (src/main/conflictResolution.ts) but there is no UI (modal/dialog) for users to choose local/cloud/merge when conflicts are detected.

SyncStatusBar only shows a global connection summary (connectedCount/totalConfigured) and total queue count. It does not display per-module sync status breakdown (e.g., kas: synced, bank: 3 pending, gudang: error).
No sync history view/page exists in the renderer. SyncSettingsPage shows only the lastSyncAt per config, not a history list of operations with direction, records count, status, and errors.

Transaction forms (KasFormPage, BankFormPage, GudangFormPage, COAFormPage, BlokFormPage, AspekKerjaFormPage) do not display an offline warning banner when the network is unavailable. The only offline indicator is the global SyncStatusBar.

appliedUpdates.description: Documented Milestone 3 user-testing findings: agent-browser cannot connect to Electron CDP in this Windows environment; validation performed via code inspection and foreground log analysis instead.
Updated assertion statuses for Milestone 3: 16 passed (verified via code/log inspection), 4 failed (missing UI components).

notes: Electron app was started successfully with --remote-debugging-port=9222 and CDP endpoint was accessible via curl.
agent-browser could not connect to the Electron CDP WebSocket (connection attempt failed / no page found), preventing UI automation.
Playwright Electron tools attempted to launch their own Electron process and failed.

Auto-sync timer, network status detection, retry mechanism, batch sync, and background sync logic were verified through direct code inspection of dist/main/autoSyncTimer.js, dist/main/networkStatus.js, dist/main/retryService.js, and dist/main/batchSyncService.js.
Foreground Electron startup logs confirmed: network status transitions from checking->online, timer resumes when online, and auto-sync initializes with 300000ms interval.

Sync UI components (SyncStatusBar, SyncContext, SyncSettingsPage) were verified via code inspection in src/renderer/components/SyncStatusBar.tsx, src/renderer/context/SyncContext.tsx, and src/renderer/pages/SyncSettingsPage.tsx.
